info.name: Cheva-Telivery API
info.description:
Backend API untuk marketplace delivery kampus.

**Base URL**: `http://localhost:3000`

**Auth Flow**:
1. Login di salah satu endpoint di section 02/03/04 (token akan otomatis tersimpan ke variable `{{buyerToken}}` / `{{sellerToken}}` / `{{adminToken}}`).
2. Token digunakan di header `Authorization: Bearer <token>` untuk endpoint yang butuh auth.
3. Variable `{{baseUrl}}` default-nya `http://localhost:3000` — bisa diubah via Postman environment.

**Roles**:
- `pembeli` (buyer) — token dari `/api/auth/buyer/verify-otp`
- `penjual` (seller) — token dari `/api/auth/seller/login`
- `admin` — token dari `/api/auth/admin/login`

**Data Dummy Siap Pakai** (di-seed via `npx ts-node scripts/seed-e2e.ts`):

| Role | Email | Phone | Password/OTP |
|---|---|---|---|
| Admin | bntngrid@gmail.com | - | admin123 |
| Buyer A (Budi Santoso) | budi@test.com | 081111111111 | - |
| Buyer B (Siti Aminah) | siti@test.com | 082222222222 | - |
| Seller A (Toko A) | a@test.com | 083333333333 | password123 |
| Seller B (Toko B - pending) | b@test.com | 084444444444 | password123 |
| Seller C (Toko C) | c@test.com | 085555555555 | password123 |

**Resources**:
- Toko A: 2 produk (Nasi Goreng, Es Teh), 1 layanan (Paket Nasi Box), approved+OPEN
- Toko B: pending+CLOSED (tidak muncul di buyer katalog)
- Toko C: 1 produk (Galon Aqua), approved+OPEN

variable.description: Auto-saved setelah 'Buyer A Login'. Digunakan untuk semua request buyer.
ID buyer Budi (otomatis ter-update setelah login)
ID Toko A (otomatis ter-update setelah login)
Nasi Goreng @15000 (Toko A) - ter-update setelah create
Toko B ID (pending+CLOSED, hidden from buyer)

request.description:
1. Buka '00. Setup' → 'Seed Dummy Data ke Database' (WAJIB pertama kali, atau pakai `npx ts-node scripts/seed-e2e.ts` di terminal)
2. Login di '00. Setup' salah satu role (Admin/Buyer/Seller) — token otomatis tersimpan
3. Jalankan endpoint lain di section 01-19 — token akan otomatis dipakai
4. Resource IDs (produkId, pesananId, dll) auto-update dari response test scripts

item.name: Seed Dummy Data (jalankan sekali di terminal)

request.description:
Jalankan di terminal:
```
npx ts-node scripts/seed-e2e.ts
```

Output akan print token siap pakai. Seed ini populate:
- 2 buyer (Budi, Siti)
- 3 seller (Toko A approved+OPEN, Toko B pending, Toko C approved+OPEN)
- 3 produk + 1 layanan
- 3 notifikasi untuk buyer + 2 notifikasi untuk seller
- 3 kategori
Auto-handles 2-step OTP login: request OTP, then verify (reads OTP from dev console if DRY_RUN=true). Token disimpan otomatis ke {{buyerToken}}.

item.name: Request OTP Login Buyer A (DRY_RUN mode)

request.description: Cek console server untuk melihat OTP 5-digit (mode DRY_RUN). Rate limit 5 req/15min.

item.name: Verify OTP Login (ganti <OTP> dengan 5-digit dari console)
Request OTP Login Buyer B (DRY_RUN mode)
List Toko Pending (Toko B + Toko C baru)

request.description: Harus return 400 karena schema strict menolak field tidak dikenal.

item.name: List My Products (Toko A punya 2 seeded)
Get Product by ID (Nasi Goreng id=4)
Get Products by Category (Toko A MAKANAN_MINUMAN)
Delete Product (id=4, file gambar akan dihapus)
List All Open Stores (Toko B hidden)
Get Store Detail (Toko B id=5, hidden → 404)
Store's Products (Toko A punya 2 produk seeded)
Create Order (1x Nasi Goreng + 1x Es Teh → Toko A)
Confirm Order Received (delivered → completed, triggers wallet credit)

body.raw:
{
  "namaLayanan": "Snack Box Meeting",
  "harga": 15000,
  "jenisLayanan": "catering",
  "estimasiDurasi": 1,
  "catatan": "Minimal order 20 box, harga per box"
}

item.name: List My Layanan (Toko A punya 1 seeded)
Add Produk ke Cart (Nasi Goreng x2)
Add Layanan ke Cart (Paket Nasi Box x1)
List My Notifications (Toko A punya 2 seeded)
Full E2E Flow (Buyer): Create order → Upload receipt → Confirm → Review
item.description:
Demo alur lengkap. Jalankan dalam urutan:
1. Login sebagai Buyer A (00. Setup)
2. Login sebagai Seller A (00. Setup)
3. 11. Order Buyer → Create Order (auto-save pesananId)
4. 12. Order Seller → Accept → Process → Deliver
5. 11. Order Buyer → Confirm → triggers wallet credit + notification
6. 11. Order Buyer → Review
7. 17. Payment → Upload Bukti Bayar (before confirm)
8. 17. Payment → Confirm Payment (seller)

Atau secara individual menggunakan request di section masing-masing.

item.name: Demo: Toko B hidden from buyer katalog
item.description:
GET /api/buyer/stores → Toko B TIDAK MUNCUL (pending+CLOSED). Hanya Toko A dan Toko C yang visible.

Untuk mengaktifkan Toko B:
1. Login admin
2. 05. Admin → Approve Toko B (id=5)
3. Refresh GET /api/buyer/stores → Toko B SEKARANG visible
